rulings.Case Title: CATHERINE HERRERA WATSON VS. TONY GARNICKI
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF CATHERINE WATSON MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: UNITY HOMES INC. VS. ANTONIKA TERRELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2019 line 9. DEFENDANT ANTONIKA TERRELL Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Judgment is continued to January 18, 2020. By no later than February 14, 2020 by 11:00 a.m. Defendant to file: (1) Proposed opposition to the Summary Judgment; (2) Complete verified responses to discovery; (3) Proposed motion for Relief From Discovery Order. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: CHANDRAKANT PATEL DBA BOSTON HOTEL VS. MICHAEL JAVIUS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT MICHAEL JAVIUS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint and Notice sufficiently state a cause of action for unlawful detainer. =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: PROPERTIES 180, LLC VS. NELSON RODRIGUEZ ET AL

rulings.Case Title: TERILYN ALLEN VS. WILLIAM BRIDGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Reclassification Pursuant To Section 403.040 Of The Civil Code Of Procedure
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT WILLIAM BRIDGE Notice Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Reclassification Pursuant To Section 403.040 Of The Civil Code Of Procedure is DENIED. The Court also notes that there is no proof of service for this motion on file in violation of CRC 3.1300(c). =(501/SKF)

rulings.Case Title: MOLLY J. ELLIOTT VS. DOUG SEWARD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Three Days Ntc To Cure Or Quit
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 14, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT DOUG SEWARD Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Three Days Ntc To Cure Or Quit is DENIED. Issues regarding the propriety of alleged method of service shall be raised at a later stage of the litigation. Motion to Quash is not a proper method of challenging the allegations regarding service of the operative notice. =(501/SKF)
